summary: Iteration 25: Tested AI features backend and frontend UI. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification successful after fixing 2 code bugs (missing greeting variable, incorrect setShowPremiumGate calls). Community tab now hidden from navigation.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: greeting variable was not defined but used in CompactDashboard component
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added getGreeting() function and greeting const to generate time-based greeting

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: setShowPremiumGate(true) called but function is named showPremiumGate with different signature
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed calls to use correct function name with proper parameters

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: setShowEggModal referenced but state is showQuickAdd
Community tab visible in navigation due to expo-router auto-discovery
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added community screen with href: null to hide it from tab bar

context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI endpoints working with 15s timeout and fallback. Frontend UI matches requirements: 2x2 AI grid, no Snabbåtgärder, no Community tab. Theme locked to rural.

backend_api_tests.ai_daily_tip: PASS - returns ok: true with tip text
backend_api_tests.ai_daily_report: PASS - returns ok: true with report
backend_api_tests.ai_advisor: PASS - returns ok: true with AI answer
backend_api_tests.ai_egg_forecast: PASS - returns ok: true with forecast
